curation_notes: The patch commit (9332d42) was identified from the v4.1.2 tag changelog and PR #34. The vulnerability is in lib/index.js in the randomDigits() function, which used Math.floor(buffer[i] / 25.6) to map random bytes to digits 0-9. Since 256 is not evenly divisible by 10, digits 0-5 each had a 26/256 probability while digits 6-9 each had a 25/256 probability, creating insufficient entropy. The fix uses rejection sampling, discarding byte values >= 250 so the remaining values map evenly to digits 0-9.
